raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a denied credit card dispute for merchandise not received. 
I purchased a sofa sectional from XXXX XXXX XXXX  and I never received, accepted, or signed for the merchandise and have never had possession of it. 
This transaction does not qualify as a return or buyers remorse. This is a case of merchandise not received, as the merchant is in possession of both the merchandise and my funds. 
Despite this, the merchant responded to my card issuer stating the item was delivered, which is factually incorrect. No signed delivery confirmation or proof of acceptance exists. 
My credit card issuer denied both the initial dispute and the re-dispute, improperly accepting the merchants false delivery claim and failing to recognize this as a case of merchandise not received. 
I am requesting that the card issuer be required to properly investigate this dispute as non-delivery and reverse the charge, as I paid for merchandise I never received.
